contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: iching_oracle GAS deploy of QMDJ-aware advisor: clasp push of the merged oracle_advisory_bridge code from the worktree, then clasp deploy --deploymentId AKfycbxhfx... to bump the production web app from version 7 to version 8 (so the existing GAS_ORACLE_ADVISORY_URL in index.html serves the new code). Bootstrap workaround needed because the repo never committed appsscript.json (pulled it down from the live project, deleted clasp's downloaded oracle_advisory_bridge.js stub, copied the merged content back in for push). End-to-end smoke test against the live URL with a sample I-Ching draw + full 9-palace QMDJ payload confirmed all 7 prompt sections render correctly: section 2 names the Ju + Three Wonders + Three Auspicious Doors positions, section 3 synthesizes I-Ching and QMDJ, section 7 picks up the directional signal (e.g. 'facing north before noon for depth and renewal' mapping to 丁 + 休門 in palace 坎). Anthropic was rate-limited so Grok handled the call via the existing fallback path; both LLM paths read the new prompt structure cleanly. Follow-up PR #10 on TrueSightDAO/oracle commits appsscript.json so the next clasp push from a fresh checkout works without the pull-bootstrap step.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
--------
